name: flight-disruption-platform
description: Flight Disruption Intelligence Platform — convenience wrappers for the polyglot monorepo (cross-platform: PowerShell / bash / zsh).

scripts.up:vps: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker-compose.vps.yml up -d --build serving
scripts.up:truenas: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker-compose.truenas.yml --profile live up -d nats live-stream
scripts.pipeline: docker compose -f docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker-compose.workingpc.yml --profile pipeline up lake-builder
